name: TCIL_UnassignReceiver
title: TCIL_UnassignReceiver
syntax: long TCIL_UnassignReceiver(dword ddi, dbNode user, dword elementNumberUser, dbNode source) // form 1
description: The functions sends an Unassign Receiver message to the setpoint value user device.

parameters.name: ddi
parameters.description: This DDI and the element number specify the setpoint value user.
